text:
Mystery Pond 不思議ヶ池 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. It summons forth a mysterious pond!
__NOTOC__

|align=center colspan="3"|Release one fish into this pond, and there will be one more fish of that type the next day. You can keep any combination of fish in this pond, even saltwater and freshwater fish together!

Summary

Mystery Pond 不思議ヶ池 - This card summons forth a mysterious pond. If you release one fish into it, the next day you will have another of that same type. This pond allows for all different kinds of fish to live within it together, regardless of whether they are freshwater or saltwater fish.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; width: 100%; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.008 - 不思議ヶ池 
この池に１匹魚を放すと次の日には１匹増えている。どんな水域に棲む魚でも生息・混泳が可能な池。
|-
![Eng]
|No.008 - Mystery Pond 
Another fish will appear the next day after releasing a pet fish into this pond. The pond can keep together fish from any type of water.
|}
